title: French Toast
description: A delicious breakfast dish made by soaking bread in a mixture of eggs and milk, then cooking it in a pan until golden brown.
instructions: In a shallow dish, whisk together the eggs and milk.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Soak the bread slices in the egg mixture for 30 seconds on each side.
Place the bread slices on the pan or griddle and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Serve warm with butter and cinnamon sprinkled on top.
